text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I arrive at Nakayama
Racecourse to watch the final race of the year,
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's totally going to win today! She's one
of the Eternal Top Three, ya know!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
But Ogurin hasn't been herself lately. I wonder
what's up with her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap certainly hasn't been racing like
normal these days.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Oguriiiiin! You can do it! Gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Ogurin didn't seem to have her usual edge
today...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Do you think she's sick? Maybe she's not eating
well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what happened either... I wonder what's
wrong...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She should rest if she's not feeling well. I'd... well,
I'd rather not watch her race if she's in pain, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri's had her head hung the whole time.
choice_data_list: It might be because she's been in a slump.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But if she keeps this up...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We’ve got a record-breaking amount of
spectators here today at Nakayama Racecourse!
Just look at those packed stands!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now it's time for the Arima Kinen racers to
take to the turf!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Backed by her many, many fans—introducing the
winner of the fan vote... Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! Oguriiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
O-GU-RI!
O-GU-RI!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pick up your head, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You take the support of the public and turn it
into power!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's your strength!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If you hang your head and close yourself off to
those around you, you won't be able to use that
strength!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I know how strong you are!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even if you don't believe in yourself, believe in
what I'm telling you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You are fierce! You are Oguri Cap, the Beast!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She's right! You're so strong, Ogurin! I love
watching you run!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text: You can win, Oguri! I know you can!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can hear your voices. I can feel your support and
warmth, filling up the void inside of me...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And I will answer you all, just watch and see!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And leading the pack, it's Oguri! Oguri Cap is in
the lead! And she takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You were back to your old self out there!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That was the strength I've yearned to best for so
long.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Next time, I want to run against you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Because I know how strong you are as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I accept.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Next race, I'll be right there beside you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Yaeno Muteki and Oguri Cap wrap up
the Arima Kinen with a vow between fierce rivals.
